name: 24-styled-output-spec-smuggle
description: Styled-output escape attempts at the engine wall (GM-R13, GENMURK-EPIC1-07): out.style specs that try to smuggle SGR fragments or break out of the token syntax. The spec grammar rejects both — a typed INVALID_PROGRAM refusal, nothing emitted. (Raw escape BYTES in emitted text are the transport boundary's problem and are pinned by the wire-sanitize tests; this fixture pins the engine wall.)
